user_input:
STACK: Python / FastAPI systems

PROJECT: Simple Blog API

DESCRIPTION:
A simple blog API.
It should support users and posts only.

FEATURES:

USERS:
- create user
- get user by id
- list all users
- delete user

POSTS:
- create post (belongs to a user)
- get post by id
- list all posts
- list posts by user
- delete post

DATA MODELS:

User:
- username: string
- email: string

Post:
- title: string
- content: string
- userId: integer

functions.name: create_user
functions.description: Create a new user in the database

functions.name: list_users
functions.description: List all users from the database

functions.name: get_user_by_id
functions.description: Get a user by ID, raises 404 if not found

functions.name: delete_user
functions.description: Delete a user by ID, raises 404 if not found

functions.name: create_post
functions.description: Create a new post in the database

functions.name: list_posts
functions.description: List all posts from the database

functions.name: get_post_by_id
functions.description: Get a post by ID, raises 404 if not found

functions.name: delete_post
functions.description: Delete a post by ID, raises 404 if not found

functions.name: list_posts_by_user
functions.description: List all posts by a specific user

functions.description: List all posts by a specific user

generated_files.app/models/user.py:
from sqlalchemy import Column, Integer, String, DateTime
from sqlalchemy.sql import func
from sqlalchemy.orm import relationship
from app.database import Base

class User(Base):
    __tablename__ = "users"

    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True, index=True)
    username = Column(String, nullable=False)
    email = Column(String, nullable=False)
    created_at = Column(DateTime, default=func.now())
    updated_at = Column(DateTime, default=func.now(), onupdate=func.now())

    posts = relationship("Post", back_populates="user")
generated_files.app/models/post.py:
from sqlalchemy import Column, Integer, String, DateTime, ForeignKey
from sqlalchemy.orm import relationship
from app.database import Base
from datetime import datetime

class Post(Base):
    __tablename__ = "posts"

    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True, index=True)
    title = Column(String, nullable=False)
    content = Column(String, nullable=False)
    user_id = Column(Integer, ForeignKey("users.id"), nullable=False)
    created_at = Column(DateTime, default=datetime.utcnow)
    updated_at = Column(DateTime, default=datetime.utcnow, onupdate=datetime.utcnow)

    user = relationship("User", back_populates="posts")
generated_files.app/main.py:
from fastapi import FastAPI
from app.database import engine, Base
from app.routes.user import router as user_router
from app.routes.post import router as post_router

app = FastAPI()

@app.on_event("startup")
def startup():
    Base.metadata.create_all(bind=engine)

app.include_router(user_router, prefix="/users")
app.include_router(post_router, prefix="/posts")
